description: Structured ratified proof-route overrides for durable-graded gold-set entries whose maintainer verdict corrected the route, where the corrected route survives only in the prose `note` and the structured agentLabels.recommendedProof still carries the pre-verdict value. The projector reads this surface instead of parsing free text (FD5/PQ2). An entry absent here resolves its route from agentLabels.recommendedProof verbatim. Anchor by claimFingerprint only. Each ratifiedProofRoute must be one of the gold-set route vocabulary values: deterministic, cautilus-eval, human-auditable.

overrides.rationale: Relabel deterministic -> cautilus-eval: R6 precedent ruled this exact claim cautilus-eval — 'enough state for the next agent to resume' is behavioral content, not a schema check. The structured agentLabels.recommendedProof keeps the pre-relabel value `deterministic`; the ratified route lives only in the entry note, so it is pinned here.
